name: creator_kit_v1
description: Raw, high-quality asset pack for organic reviews and influencer collaborations.

sequence.prompt: Professional documentary-style branded intro card for {actor_name} in {title_text}. Neutral background with clean text: 'Creator Asset Pack: {actor_name} Highlights'. NO voiceover.

sequence.guidance: Highest-confidence scene of {actor_name} with clear dialogue
Visually striking wide shot or action scene featuring {actor_name}
Tight reaction shot or dramatic close-up of {actor_name}

sequence.prompt: Simple outro card with licensing info: 'Pre-cleared for use in reviews. Credits: {title_text}'.
